ValidationRule.description: Only PM is allowed to change this information
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, $User.IsProjectManager__c=false, OR( ISCHANGED(PackageStatus__c ), ISCHANGED(RecordTypeId), ISCHANGED(ProjectName__c), ISCHANGED(Name), ISCHANGED(ProjectCurrency__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You do not have the permission to change this information. Please get in touch with the Project Manager. (PA024)
